summary:
TrendVault Daily Trend Scan — 2026-05-20

Scanned 12 trending products across ExplodingTopics and established TikTok/Instagram viral patterns.

Top 3 Trends:
1. 🎙️ Podcast Microphone — 60.5K search vol, +1150% growth. Highest volume product in scan. Creator economy driving sustained demand through summer podcast launch season.
2. 💊 GLP-1 Supplement — 49.5K search vol, +925% growth. Natural Ozempic alternative trend still surging. Summer weight loss season arriving.
3. 🧴 PDRN Cream — 40.5K search vol, +5900% growth. Korean regenerative skincare leading beauty category. Solidifying as retinol replacement.

Trend Stability: All top ExplodingTopics trends holding steady week-over-week with no volume changes. No new breakout signals detected this scan.

Categories tracked: gadgets: 4, fitness: 3, beauty: 2, pets: 2, home: 1

Sources: ExplodingTopics.com (via CloakBrowser). Amazon Movers & Shakers blocked by CAPTCHA. Google Trends Shopping timed out via Smartproxy.
Next: Content gen cron at 09:00 will use this data for blog post generation.
